ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Men's, Women's, Kids) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Unique code for internal tracking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the size belongs to */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the size */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement category */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement category (e.g., Front Rise, Back Rise) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement category */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Measurement unit (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance range for the measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_measurements" (
  "product_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product measurement */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement category */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement in inches */,
  "tolerance_value" REAL /* Tolerance value for the specific measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_measurements_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, quality assurance, production manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "product_measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_measurement_id") REFERENCES product_measurements ("product_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product version */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the product */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when this version became effective */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_versions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
